# TYPE test_runner_task_requested_total counter
test_runner_task_requested_total 4

# TYPE test_expression_code_cache_size gauge
test_expression_code_cache_size 0

# TYPE test_expression_evaluation_duration_seconds histogram
test_expression_evaluation_duration_seconds_bucket{le="0.0001",status="success",type="none"} 0
